evals.prompt: /gmail-composer-drafter draft a concise product update for beta users announcing saved templates
evals.expected_output: Mode A: Draft a complete email with subject, preview text, email body, and editor notes.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode A: Draft.
Agent loads references/composition-guide.md.
Agent includes Subject, Preview Text, Email Body, and Editor Notes sections.
Agent does not output raw HTML.
Agent mentions Copy for Gmail only in Editor Notes.

evals.prompt: Write a concise follow-up email asking Pat whether they reviewed the proposal and can reply this week.
evals.expected_output: An implicit natural-language trigger that auto-detects the closest mode and drafts a follow-up email.
assertions: Agent auto-detects the closest mode as Mode A: Draft from natural language.
Agent includes a subject and preview text.
Agent does not ask the user to choose a mode when intent is clear.

evals.prompt: /gmail-composer-drafter revise make this warmer: Hi Pat, checking whether you reviewed the proposal. Reply today if possible.
evals.expected_output: Mode B: Improve existing email copy while preserving the original ask without inventing details.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode B: Revise.
Agent preserves the request to review the proposal and reply.
Agent does not invent a meeting, discount, deadline, or relationship history.
Agent includes a brief changelog of meaningful edits.

evals.prompt: /gmail-composer-drafter outline a monthly investor update about product progress and runway
evals.expected_output: Mode C: Produce an email structure before drafting, with sections, purposes, and notes.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode C: Outline.
Agent returns a sectioned structure rather than a complete email draft.
Agent avoids inventing metrics or runway numbers.

evals.prompt: /gmail-composer-drafter subject launch announcement for a new reporting dashboard
evals.expected_output: Mode D: Generate subject and preview text options grouped by tone.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode D: Subject.
Agent returns multiple subject options.
Agent includes one preview text recommendation.

evals.prompt:
/gmail-composer-drafter paste-plan # Update
Please review https://example.com and reply by Friday.
evals.expected_output: Mode E: Convert copy into editor-entry guidance that normalizes headings, paragraphs, links, and the final Copy for Gmail handoff.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode E: Paste Plan.
Agent gives visual editor entry guidance instead of raw HTML.
Agent ends with the Copy for Gmail handoff instruction.

evals.expected_output: Show mode menu with examples for draft, revise, outline, subject, and paste-plan.
assertions: Agent handles empty arguments with a concise mode menu.
Agent includes examples for the available modes.
Agent does not draft an email without a user goal.

evals.prompt: Clean up my Gmail inbox and create filters for newsletters
evals.expected_output: A negative control scope refusal that says this skill should not trigger for inbox management and points to email-whiz where appropriate.
assertions: Agent does not trigger composition mode for inbox triage.
Agent refuses or redirects because inbox management is not for this skill.
Agent redirects inbox management to email-whiz.
Agent does not use Gmail API tools.
